description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2024 BMW X7 M60i Xdrive, 4.4 TC V8, 4WD, 530bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 369,000 or AED 5,881 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 35,876 KM's - BMW Warranty Until 29th April 2029 or 200,000 KM's - BMW Service Contract Until 29th April 2029 or 100,000 KMs - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Full Matte PPF - M Sport Brake Calipers - M Sport Exhaust System - Panorama Glass Roof Sky Lounge - BMW Individual Shadowline Lights - 360 Surround View - Carbon Interior Package - Carbon Wing Mirrors - Ambient Air Package - Massage Function for Driver And Passenger - Wireless Apple CarPlay & Android Auto - Bowers & Wilkins Surround Sound System - BMW Gesture Control - Air Suspension - M Aerodynamics Package - Ambient Lighting Package
